headline: Forget Plug Power: 1 High-Yield Industrial Giant to Buy Hand Over Fist
summary: Plug Power (NASDAQ:PLUG) is the headline darling again, with shares up 393.28% over the past year as retail traders pile back into the hydrogen narrative on tax-credit chatter and high-profile customer name-drops. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The Plug Power Math Still Does Not Work Strip away the story and the financials ... Forget Plug Power: 1 High-Yield Industrial Giant to Buy Hand Over Fist

headline: How Air Products (APD) Is Pairing Industrial Gas Growth With Semiconductor Demand
summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) is one of the best stocks to buy according to Goldman Sachs’ Conviction List. Goldman added Air Products to its U.S. Conviction List in October 2025, citing potential growth in industrial gas demand as manufacturing activity improves, with a Buy rating and a $335 price target at the time. […]
